label: Transparent hummingbird hawk moth motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated hummingbird hawk moth motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single hummingbird hawk moth hovering in profile-three-quarter view with accurate insect anatomy, clear antennae, large taupe-brown transparent-veined wings frozen in a swift hover pose, compact fuzzy body, warm orange tail fan, subtle lavender reflected highlights, long curved proboscis tucked elegantly, delicate legs, and fine scale texture. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full moth, wings, body, orange tail, antennae, legs, and proboscis without cropping. Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Constraints: do not include flowers, meadow, leaves, sky, second insect, bird anatomy, toy look, jewelry look, text, watermark, cast shadow, contact shadow, or reflection. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the moth.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent hummingbird hawk moth motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth", derived from the visible transparent hummingbird hawk moth cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth, Hummingbird Hawk Moth, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from taupe wing membranes, warm brown wing veins, fuzzy cream body, orange tail fan, lavender wing sheen, flower meadow atmosphere, and swift hover motion. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and sample product panels. Typography guidance: include English guidance for fast creator workflows and Japanese guidance labeled Japanese Typography / 日本語, with clean sans UI, elegant display, tabular mono, and Noto Sans JP support. Style: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible swift creator system, precise airy grid, 8px radius, wing-vein separators, hover-ring focus states, soft meadow light surfaces, taupe cards, orange action accents, lavender secondary highlights, cream readable surfaces, and subtle motion-streak texture. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no unrelated saturated colors, no generic blue/purple gradient, no one-note palette. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth" or "Hummingbird Hawk Moth", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent hummingbird hawk moth motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible hummingbird hawk moth cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections: Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth, Hummingbird Hawk Moth, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Sample Usage. Visual details: dark background derived from charcoal wing shadow and dusk flower meadow; foreground from moth cream and pale meadow mist; primary actions from orange tail; secondary states from lavender wing sheen; surfaces from smoky taupe and deep brown; borders from wing-vein taupe; subtle motion-streak texture and translucent wing membrane overlays. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, sidebar and top navigation, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, and sample usage cards. Typography guidance: include English guidance for swift creator workflows and Japanese guidance labeled Japanese Typography / 日本語, with clean sans UI, elegant display, tabular mono, and Noto Sans JP support. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic blue/purple gradients, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Hummingbird Hawk Moth" or "Hummingbird Hawk Moth", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
